3105290.name: Painted Shores
3105290.description:
Painted Shores is an open world single-player third-person mystery set in the Caribbean.

Painted Shores is a single-player, third-person mystery set in a vast open-world Caribbean. Inspired by Uncharted and Outer Wilds, with the atmosphere of Firewatch, it blends cinematic action, exploration, and puzzle-solving into one seamless experience.

Players can travel freely across the islands by boat and on foot, discovering hidden coves, climbing through ruins, and diving into shipwrecks. The world is alive and constantly shifting. Tides uncover new pathways, ruins collapse into the jungle, and day-night cycles change how each environment feels. Every visit to a familiar place can reveal something new.

Combat is tense and varied. Engage pirates in third-person shootouts, sneak through their camps, or use tools like smoke grenades, explosives, and flashbangs to outsmart them. Weapons and equipment can be upgraded and traded, letting players tailor their approach to combat and exploration. Boat chases, stealth infiltrations, and sudden firefights keep every encounter unpredictable.

Beyond combat, Painted Shores rewards curiosity. Temples and ancient structures hide puzzles that unlock new areas and treasures. Social spaces and island gatherings provide opportunities to rest, gather clues, and build alliances that shape your journey.

Every corner of the world offers a mix of danger and discovery. From dynamic environments to hidden pathways, the Caribbean setting is designed to surprise players and keep them exploring long after the storm has passed.
3105290.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
